issues.title: Add retry disabled
issues.body:
**Expected Behavior** 

<!--- Tell us how it should work. Add a code example to explain what you think the feature should look like. This is optional, but it would help up understand your expectations. -->

I wish `SpringAiRetryAutoConfiguration` could be disabled like `AnthropicAutoConfiguration`, `ChatClientAutoConfiguration` and so on.

**Current Behavior**

<!--- Explain the difference from current behavior and why do you need this feature (aka why it is not possible to implement the desired functionality with the current version) -->

The `SpringAiRetryAutoConfiguration` cannot be disabled and the `spring.ai.retry.max-attempts` property cannot be set 0.

**Context**

<!--- 
How has this issue affected you?
What are you trying to accomplish?
What other alternatives have you considered?
Are you aware of any workarounds?
-->

I'm using `OpenAiChatModel` and `ChatClient`, and I don't want to retry.

comments.body:
Show us the stack trace you get when [setting property](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/chat/openai-chat.html#_retry_properties) `spring.ai.retry.max-attempts=0`.

Also, make sure you're using the latest Spring AI version (`1.0.0-M1`).

I wanted to disable retries because my application was retrying at 400 and 429 errors.

However, my problem seems to be related to this issue(#846) rather than the retry disabling feature.

I apologize for the confusion and will close this issue.

Below, I'll leave a log of the issues we encountered.

```
2024-07-16T14:54:29.306+09:00  WARN 69522 --- [tech-swipe-batch] [tSummarizeJob-3] o.s.a.a.r.SpringAiRetryAutoConfiguration : Retry error. Retry count:4

    "param": "messages",
    "code": "context_length_exceeded"
  }
}

> Show us the stack trace you get when [setting property](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/chat/openai-chat.html#_retry_properties) `spring.ai.retry.max-attempts=0`.
> 
> Also, make sure you're using the latest Spring AI version (`1.0.0-M1`).

@codespearhead Thank you for your interest. However, I have fixed this issue, see #1075 for that.

I'll show you the logs, though, in case you're curious.

This is that log. And I'm using Spring AI version 1.0.0-M1.

This exception seems to be related to RetryTemplateBuilder, not Spring AI.

```
....
